a:r.a:t: • Auto-ingests tickets, emails, alerts, and Teams inputs• Classifies intent, priority, ticket type, and affected journey• Recommends category, SOP, runbook, and resolver group• Detects P1 signals and triggers HITL escalation• Enriches L2 handoff with RCA draft, logs, and related history• Auto-drafts stakeholder updates, ticket notes, and closure summaries
Functional, technical, QA, and PM teams manually hand over scope, acceptance criteria, architecture, test coverage, defects, environments, monitoring, SLAs, and warranty details before go-
Compiles HOTS packages from project and delivery artifacts
Consolidates scope, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Captures architecture, code context, and release information
Maps test coverage, open defects, and known issues
Loads dependencies, monitoring thresholds, and SLA triggers
Creates support-ready knowledge, runbooks, and warranty context
